intro: Four steps from first call to a system running in your business.

steps.title: Discovery call
steps.body: A 15-minute call to hear where leads are leaking, what tools you already use, and whether automation is the right fix.

steps.title: Scope and quote
steps.body: A plain-English scope with the exact automation, the build fee, the monthly retainer, and the timeline. No mystery pricing.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: I build, test with 10 to 20 simulated leads, and run it against your live setup before anything touches a real customer.

steps.title: Handoff and retainer
steps.body: You get a Loom walkthrough, a written runbook, and ongoing monitoring on retainer so the system keeps working next month.
